_comment: TEMPLATE — known data-broker / people-search opt-out REGISTRY. THIS IS A TEMPLATE, NOT SCRAPED DATA. Every entry below records ONLY each broker's own PUBLICLY DOCUMENTED opt-out URL + method (the routes the brokers themselves publish). It contains NO listing about any person, NO fabricated 'we found you on X' result, and asserts nothing about whether YOU are listed. A real listing is confirmed ONLY from REAL crawler output (a module_event whose source_url host matches a broker.host) passed to optout-policy.js — never from this file. `is_template: true` is carried so no consumer can mistake registry entries for findings. Opt-out URLs/methods change; the operator MUST re-verify each broker's current opt-out page before relying on it. Sources: each broker's published privacy/opt-out page; cross-referenced with public consumer-rights guidance (e.g. EFF/Privacy Rights Clearinghouse broker opt-out lists, California Delete Act / DROP registry).
review_banner: Re-verify every opt-out URL + method against the broker's current site before use. Routes change without notice.

brokers.name: Spokeo
brokers.notes: Paste the exact listing URL; confirm via the emailed link.

brokers.name: Whitepages
brokers.notes: Suppression request may require an automated phone verification call.

brokers.name: BeenVerified
brokers.notes: Search for your record, select it, confirm via email.

brokers.name: Intelius
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect-family broker; opt-out may also suppress sibling sites.

brokers.name: Radaris
brokers.notes: Requires claiming/controlling the profile before removal.

brokers.name: MyLife
brokers.notes: Use the CCPA portal; phone follow-up sometimes required.

brokers.name: Acxiom (LiveRamp)
brokers.notes: Marketing data broker (not a people-search page); opt-out is a suppression request, no public listing URL to cite.
